test_description: Verify VPC Subnet Isolation and Route Table Configuration
business_risk: Critical security vulnerability if private resources are exposed publicly.
test_steps: 1. Deploy a test EC2 instance/pod into the private subnet. 2. Attempt to SSH/Connect to the instance directly from a public IP. 3. Attempt to reach the internet from the private instance via NAT Gateway.
expected_result: Direct public access is denied (timeout). Outbound internet access is successful via NAT Gateway.
success_criteria: Private subnet is effectively isolated from inbound public traffic.
cleanup_requirements: Destroy test instances via Terraform destroy.
security_considerations: Ensure Security Groups allow testing traffic.

test_description: Validate pgvector extension installation and vector operations
preconditions: RDS instance active, Application user connected.
test_steps: 1. Connect to PostgreSQL database. 2. Execute 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;'. 3. Create a table with a vector(1536) column. 4. Insert a test vector record. 5. Perform a nearest neighbor search (ORDER BY vector <-> query_vector).
expected_result: Extension exists, table creates successfully, insert succeeds, query returns results sorted by distance.
success_criteria: Vector operations execute without syntax or permission errors.

test_description: Verify User Login Flow and JWT Token Issuance with Cognito
business_risk: Users cannot access the system; Security breach.
preconditions: User exists in Cognito User Pool with confirmed status.
test_steps: 1. Call Auth Login endpoint with valid email/password. 2. Capture response tokens (ID, Access, Refresh). 3. Decode Access Token. 4. Validate 'iss', 'exp', and custom claims (role).
expected_result: HTTP 200 OK. Valid JWT returned with correct role claim and future expiration.

test_description: Verify Idle Session Timeout and Logout
business_risk: Unattended sessions leading to unauthorized access.
preconditions: User logged in, Idle timeout configured to 15 minutes.
test_steps: 1. Log in to dashboard. 2. Perform no actions for 14 minutes. 3. Verify Warning Modal appears. 4. Wait 1 more minute (Total 15). 5. Verify automatic redirection to Login page. 6. Attempt to use previous session token via API.
expected_result: Warning modal appears at configured threshold. User redirected to login. Old token rejected by API (401 Unauthorized).
environment_requirements: Test Env with short timeout config
success_criteria: Session terminated on client and server.
accessibility_requirements: Warning modal must be keyboard accessible.

test_description: Validate Vendor Invitation and Registration Flow
test_steps: 1. Admin sends invitation to new vendor email. 2. Retrieve secure link from mock email service. 3. Navigate to link. 4. Complete registration form (Password, Name). 5. Submit form. 6. Attempt login with new credentials.
expected_result: Invitation email received. Link validates. Account status changes from Invited to Active. Login successful.

test_description: Verify DTO Validation for Vendor Creation
business_risk: Corrupt or incomplete data entering the system.
test_steps: 1. Send POST request to /vendors with missing 'company_name'. 2. Send POST with invalid email format. 3. Send POST with valid payload.
expected_result: Case 1 & 2: Return 400 Bad Request with specific error messages. Case 3: Return 201 Created with Vendor object.
success_criteria: Validation logic catches all invalid inputs.

test_description: Performance Test for Large CSV Vendor Import
business_risk: System hang or crash during data migration.
preconditions: CSV file with 10,000 vendor records generated.
test_steps: 1. Upload 10k row CSV to import endpoint. 2. Monitor API response time (initial acknowledgment). 3. Monitor background worker processing time. 4. Verify memory usage during parsing.
expected_result: API acknowledges upload < 2s. Processing completes asynchronously. No memory spikes > 80%. All 10k records inserted.

test_description: Verify Presigned URL Permissions and File Type Restrictions
business_risk: Malicious file upload; Unauthorized bucket access.
test_steps: 1. Request upload URL for '.exe' file. 2. Request upload URL for '.pdf' file. 3. Attempt to use presigned URL to upload a file larger than limit. 4. Attempt to use presigned URL after expiration.
expected_result: 1. 400 Bad Request (Invalid type). 2. 200 OK (URL returned). 3. S3 rejects upload (Size limit). 4. S3 rejects upload (Expired).
test_data_needs: Dummy PDF, Dummy EXE, Large dummy file.
success_criteria: Only valid file types/sizes accepted securely.

test_description: Verify PII Redaction Accuracy using Comprehend
business_risk: GDPR violation; Leaking sensitive client data.
preconditions: S3 contains document with known PII samples (Names, Phones, Emails).
test_steps: 1. Trigger ingestion event for test document. 2. Wait for worker processing. 3. Retrieve processed text from database/S3. 4. Compare against original to ensure PII is replaced with placeholders.
expected_result: All known PII entities replaced (e.g., [NAME], [PHONE]). Non-PII text remains intact.

test_description: Verify Semantic Search Relevance
business_risk: Poor vendor matches leading to lost revenue.
preconditions: Database seeded with 50 vendors with distinct skill profiles. Project Brief embedding generated.
test_steps: 1. Create Project Brief requiring 'Python' and 'Data Science'. 2. Execute matching query. 3. Analyze top 5 results.
expected_result: Top results must be vendors with 'Python'/'Data Science' skills. Vendors with unrelated skills (e.g., 'Construction') must not appear or have very low scores.
test_data_needs: Seeded Vendor Profiles, Test Project Brief.
success_criteria: High cosine similarity for relevant vendors.

test_description: Verify Admin Edit and Approval Workflow for Project Brief
business_risk: Incorrect project data sent to vendors.
test_steps: 1. Admin opens Brief. 2. Edits 'Scope' field. 3. Saves changes. 4. Clicks 'Approve'. 5. Verifies status change to 'Approved'. 6. Verifies Audit Log entry created.
expected_result: Changes persisted. Status updated. Audit log records user, timestamp, and changes.

test_description: Validate One-Time Token Access for Proposal Submission
test_steps: 1. Generate secure link token for Vendor A. 2. Access link (Success). 3. Attempt to access link again (if configured as one-time) OR check expiry enforcement. 4. Attempt to access link with modified token signature.
expected_result: Valid token grants access. Modified/Expired token returns 403 Forbidden. Access logs recorded.
security_considerations: No token leakage in URL logs.

test_description: Verify Invoice Creation and Webhook Handling
test_steps: 1. Create Invoice via internal API. 2. Verify Invoice exists in Stripe. 3. Simulate 'invoice.paid' webhook from Stripe. 4. Verify internal Invoice status updates to 'PAID'.
expected_result: Invoice created in Stripe. Webhook signature validated. Internal status updated correctly.
success_criteria: End-to-end sync between Stripe and DB.

test_description: Verify Saga Compensation Logic on Wise Transfer Failure
business_risk: Inconsistent financial state (Money deducted but not sent).
preconditions: Mocked Wise API to return failure.
test_steps: 1. Initiate Payout Saga. 2. Step 1 (Lock Funds in DB) succeeds. 3. Step 2 (Wise Transfer) fails. 4. Saga Orchestrator triggers compensation. 5. Verify DB Funds unlocked/marked 'Failed'.
expected_result: System returns to consistent state. Error logged. No funds lost.

test_description: Verify Quote Generation and Transfer Creation
test_steps: 1. Request quote for 1000 USD to EUR. 2. Validate quote response. 3. Create transfer based on quote. 4. Verify transfer ID returned.
expected_result: Valid quote received. Transfer created in Wise Sandbox.

test_description: Verify Email Dispatch via SES
test_steps: 1. Trigger 'Project Created' event. 2. Notification Service consumes event. 3. Verify SES SendEmail API called with correct template and recipient.
expected_result: Email dispatched successfully.

test_description: Verify Webhook Retry Logic
test_steps: 1. Configure webhook to point to failing endpoint (500 error). 2. Trigger event. 3. Monitor retry attempts. 4. Verify exponential backoff behavior.
expected_result: System retries delivery X times with increasing delay before giving up.

test_description: Verify Audit Log Immutability and Completeness
test_steps: 1. Perform critical action (e.g., Delete Vendor). 2. Query Audit Log for entry. 3. Verify user ID, timestamp, IP, and action details are present. 4. Attempt to update the log entry via API (should fail).
expected_result: Log entry exists and is accurate. Update attempt returns 403/405 (Method Not Allowed).

test_description: Verify User Erasure (Right to be Forgotten)
preconditions: User exists with PII in multiple tables (Profile, Proposals).
test_steps: 1. Initiate Erasure Request for User ID. 2. Run Erasure Job. 3. Check User table (PII masked/deleted). 4. Check Proposal table (PII masked). 5. Verify Transaction logs retain non-PII financial data (legal requirement).
expected_result: PII is removed/anonymized. Financial records intact but anonymized.

test_description: Verify Dashboard Load Performance (LCP)
test_steps: 1. Navigate to Dashboard. 2. Measure Largest Contentful Paint (LCP). 3. Verify all widgets load within threshold.
expected_result: LCP < 2.5s. All widgets visible.

test_description: Verify Proposal Comparison Logic and UI
test_steps: 1. Select 3 proposals. 2. Click 'Compare'. 3. Verify side-by-side view renders correctly. 4. Verify highlighting of 'best' values (e.g., lowest cost).
expected_result: Comparison view renders accurate data for all selected proposals.
